s: In 1991, Bret Barberie suited up for MON as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.353, OPS 0.949, HR 2, RBI 18, WAR 2.000.

Changed teams after the previous season (MON -> FLA).

In 1994, Bret Barberie suited up for FLA as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.301, OPS 0.762, HR 5, RBI 31, WAR 1.800.
Changed teams after the previous season (FLA -> BAL).
In 1995, Bret Barberie suited up for BAL as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.241, OPS 0.676, HR 2, RBI 25, WAR 1.100. Notable context: Joined BAL.
Changed teams after the previous season (BAL -> CHC).
